name_en: 【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
name_cn:
【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
The be alma handbag blends the brand's iconic Alma handbag and makeup pouch designs, playing with urban travel style in the 2025 Cruise early spring collection. The compact structure features a woven chain strap, serving as a clutch or worn crossbody with a long shoulder strap.
Size: 15 x 7 x 27 cm
